rows.label: tev025201_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Nastasha for her thoughts on Elma.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025201_MSG0001
rows.name:
Having to call for reinforcements was
a blunder born from our own mistakes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025201_MSG0002
rows.name:
But the one silver lining was that
the great Elma herself—or rather,
Team Elma—came to save us![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025201_MSG0003
rows.name:
Still, I hope we can keep this a
secret from Commander Vandham?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025201_MSG0004
rows.name:
I know he'd completely blow up at us if he
knew. Probably accuse us of being cocky just
because we managed to fight off the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025201_MSG0010
rows.name:
Piers, who guards the west
gate, is a really nice guy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025201_MSG0013
rows.name:
He always lets me know when Elma
passes through the west gate.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025201_MSG0014
rows.name:
Er, it's not like I'm
stalking her or anything![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev025201_MSG0015
rows.name:
It's just human nature to want
to know what the people you
admire are up to, right?[ST:wait ]
